title: ARTEL FamilyGeometryRecipe
description: Parametric geometry recipe for a Revit family (W10.2 geometry layer). A vision/extraction model (W10.1) reads the source (datasheet/drawing/image) and produces this recipe: it classifies the shape into a known parametric archetype and binds the archetype's dimensions to family parameters. The recipe never encodes raw Revit geometry — the archetype -> Revit API operations mapping is deterministic code.

archetype.description: Key into the archetype library, e.g. rect_cabinet, panel.

bindings.description: archetype dimension name -> family parameter name.

source.description: Provenance from the extraction step (vision). Drives confidence/HITL.
